summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sunpreet coaching website. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% test pass rate. Frontend mostly working with one minor UI interaction issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Time dropdown remains open and blocks form submission button interaction
ui_bugs.description: When time picker dropdown is opened, it creates an overlay that prevents clicking the submit button. This is likely a z-index or positioning issue with the Select component.

passed_tests: Testimonials API (/api/testimonials) - returns 3 testimonials with correct structure
Retreats API (/api/retreats) - returns 3 retreats with 4+ images each
Contact form API (/api/contact) - accepts valid submissions and sends emails
Email validation - rejects invalid emails with 422 status
Status endpoints (/api/status) - POST and GET working
Homepage hero section loads with proper typography
Navigation works across all pages (desktop and mobile)
Testimonials section loads API data successfully
Retreats gallery loads API data and displays 3 retreat cards
Retreats lightbox opens and closes correctly when clicking cards
Mobile navigation menu toggles and shows all links
Contact form fields can be filled (name, email, phone, message)
Calendly button has correct href and target=_blank
Social media links (Instagram, YouTube) configured correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix time picker dropdown overlay issue in ContactPage.jsx - likely z-index or Select component positioning problem preventing form submission
